steps.subject: Congrats on your new home at {street} — quick garage door tip
steps.body:
Hi {first_name},

Congrats on the new place at {street} in {city}! I'm Tal with Goldman's Garage Door Repair — we're local here in {county}.

Quick tip from one neighbor to another: most people don't think about their garage door when they move in, but it's the largest moving part in your house. Springs wear out, openers lose their settings, and safety sensors get bumped during moves.

We're offering new homeowners a free garage door safety inspection — consider it a housewarming gift. We'll check your springs, cables, opener, and safety reverse. Takes about 20 minutes, no sales pitch.

Want to schedule one? Just reply to this email or give me a call.

Tal Goldman
Goldman's Garage Door Repair
{phone}

steps.subject: Re: Free garage door checkup for {street}
steps.body:
Hey {first_name},

Just following up on the free garage door inspection for your new place at {street}. Hope the move-in is going smoothly.

Here's what we check — takes about 20 minutes:

- Torsion springs (the #1 thing that fails without warning)
- Cables and rollers
- Opener force and safety reverse
- Weather seal and bottom seal

If everything looks good, you get peace of mind. If something needs attention, we'll let you know what it is and what it'd cost — no pressure.

Just reply or call when you're settled in.

Tal
{phone}

steps.subject: Last note from Tal — welcome to {city}
steps.body:
Hey {first_name},

Last note from me — I won't keep bugging you while you're unpacking boxes.

The free garage door inspection offer stands whenever you're ready. No expiration. And if anything ever acts up with your garage door at {street} — weird noise, won't close all the way, remote stops working — just give me a call.

Welcome to the neighborhood.

Tal Goldman
Goldman's Garage Door Repair
{phone}

notes: Send from MI number for MI leads, NC number for NC leads. Target homes sold within last 30 days. Personal, warm tone — they just made a big life decision.
